<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Gif\Encoders; use Intervention\Gif\Blocks\TableBasedImage; class TableBasedImageEncoder extends AbstractEncoder { public function __construct(TableBasedImage $source) { $this->source = $source; } public function encode(): string { return implode('', [ $this->source->getImageDescriptor()->encode(), $this->source->getColorTable() ? $this->source->getColorTable()->encode() : '', $this->source->getImageData()->encode(), ]); } }
